title: Dense Smoky Italian Rice Vermicelli Paella
description: A hearty, smoky Italian dish featuring rice vermicelli, nuka-pickle and a blend of savory spices. Perfect for a festive dinner.
instructions: Heat the bone broth in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Italian sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the rice vermicelli and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the nuka-pickle, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the lid and continue to cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the bottom of the paella pan is crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or scallions if desired.
